data.content: Planning complete. Implement in a dedicated worktree and run bun install --frozen-lockfile before checks. Primary files: src/lib/beat-state-overview.ts for merged terminal grouping and pure visibility helpers, src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx for localStorage-backed hidden-column state plus restore control, src/components/beat-state-overview-matrix.tsx for per-column icon hide controls and Terminated label, and src/components/beat-overview-tile.tsx for optional terminal state badges. Update focused tests in src/lib/__tests__/beat-state-overview.test.ts and src/components/__tests__/beat-state-overview-matrix-header.test.ts; validate with Playwright MCP per acceptance criteria. No child knots needed.
